headline: Analog Semiconductors Stocks Q1 Highlights: Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP)
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at analog semiconductors stocks, starting with Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP).
